scripts.test:planning: npm run preflight && playwright test planning.spec.ts
scripts.test:planning-full: npm run preflight && playwright test planning.spec.ts planning-full-functionality.spec.js
scripts.test:planning-webkit: npm run preflight && playwright test planning.spec.ts planning-full-functionality.spec.js --project=webkit --project=mobile-webkit
scripts.test:planning-all: npm run preflight && playwright test planning.spec.ts planning-full-functionality.spec.js
